requirements.summary: Deploy the current version of the application with the compacted punch in/out layout in ReportForm to production
acceptanceCriteria: The live environment reflects the compacted punch in/out date and time side-by-side layout in ReportForm.
The PDF generator renders punch in/out date and time on single lines as expected.
All previously working features remain functional in the live deployment.

file_operations.description: Verify the compacted punch in/out layout is present and correctly implemented, showing date and time inputs side-by-side on a single row for both the lead tech and additional technicians. Ensure all form functionality including localStorage persistence and signature canvas remain intact.

Verify the PDF generator correctly renders punch in/out date and time on single lines as expected, matching the compacted layout from ReportForm. Ensure all PDF sections (project info, personnel, work details, status, notes, signature) render correctly.
Verify the root component renders correctly with the sticky industrial-themed header, hero banner with feature icons, ReportForm, and footer. Ensure all previously working features remain functional.
